{"id":"project-LICHEN-vh1i","title":"unprotect_response doesn't update replay window for response PIV","description":"File: rust/lichen-oscore/src/lib.rs
Lines: 602-614

In unprotect_response, when a response includes its own PIV (not using request_piv), the code does NOT update the replay window:
```rust
// SECURITY: No replay check for responses - they're correlated with requests
let tag_start = ciphertext.len() - TAG_LEN;
...
cipher.decrypt_in_place_detached(...)
```

Per RFC 8613 Section 7.4.2, responses are correlated with requests, so traditional replay protection isn't needed. However, if a server sends multiple responses with different PIVs (e.g., for observe notifications), the client should track these.

For simple request-response, no issue. For CoAP Observe (RFC 7641), the same OSCORE context may receive multiple notifications with incrementing PIVs. Without tracking, a replayed notification could be accepted.

Impact: Potential replay of observe notifications.

Fix: For observe support, add optional replay tracking for responses with PIV.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:38:35.18844Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:38:35.188484Z"}

{"id":"project-LICHEN-vh1i","title":"unprotect_response doesn't update replay window for response PIV","description":"File: rust/lichen-oscore/src/lib.rs
Lines: 602-614

In unprotect_response, when a response includes its own PIV (not using request_piv), the code does NOT update the replay window:
```rust
// SECURITY: No replay check for responses - they're correlated with requests
let tag_start = ciphertext.len() - TAG_LEN;
...
cipher.decrypt_in_place_detached(...)
```

Per RFC 8613 Section 7.4.2, responses are correlated with requests, so traditional replay protection isn't needed. However, if a server sends multiple responses with different PIVs (e.g., for observe notifications), the client should track these.

For simple request-response, no issue. For CoAP Observe (RFC 7641), the same OSCORE context may receive multiple notifications with incrementing PIVs. Without tracking, a replayed notification could be accepted.

Impact: Potential replay of observe notifications.

Fix: For observe support, add optional replay tracking for responses with PIV.","status":"in_progress","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","assignee":"AI Agent","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:38:35.18844Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-22T23:20:53.492631381Z","started_at":"2026-07-22T23:20:53.492631381Z","lease_expires_at":"2026-07-22T23:25:53.492631381Z","heartbeat_at":"2026-07-22T23:20:53.492631381Z"}
new_value: {"notes":"Commit: abdfba676 (replay protection added for response PIVs in unprotect_response)"}
